overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a snowy tribal settlement. The weather transitions from active snowfall to clear blue skies as she moves from a narrow path through a fortified village and exits into a forested wilderness area.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy path beside tribal wooden hut

events.description: heavy snowfall stops and sky begins to clear

agents.ego_description: walking along narrow snowy path beside primitive wooden structures

entered.detail: primitive structure made of logs and wooden planks with red painted accents
defensive fence made of sharpened wooden logs with red markings
snow-covered bushes with distinctive red foliage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a snowy narrow path beside a tribal wooden hut. Heavy snow falls as the character walks forward along the snow-covered trail, passing spiked wooden fortifications. The weather transitions from snowy to clear as the segment ends.

events.description: sky clears revealing bright blue sky and direct sunlight
exiting narrow path into open village approach with stone ruins visible

agents.ego_description: walking toward village entrance as weather clears, approaching stone structures

entered.detail: tall ancient stone structure with weathered walls and broken windows
large wooden entrance structure with spiked logs and red banners

segments.scene_description: As the snow stops and blue sky appears, the scene opens into a wider approach to a tribal village. Ancient stone tower ruins rise on the left while a large spiked wooden gate looms ahead. The character walks steadily toward the village entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal village center with wooden structures

events.description: entering village center with NPCs and wooden carts visible

agents.ego_description: walking through village center past wooden carts and tribal NPCs

notable_agents.action: tribal villager walking near wooden cart
armed guard standing near wooden structure

entered.detail: primitive wooden wagon with large wheels parked near the path
tall carved wooden pole with tribal decorations and red paint

segments.scene_description: The character enters the village center where tribal NPCs walk among wooden structures. A wooden cart sits on the left while a tall totem pole stands in the center. The stone ruins recede into the background as the character moves deeper into the settlement.

events.description: approaching large spiked gate marking village exit
passing under the massive wooden gate arch

agents.ego_description: walking through the massive spiked gate to exit the village

entered.detail: enormous fortified entrance made of massive spiked logs with red markings and hanging ropes

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through a massive fortified gate made of enormous spiked logs. This marks the exit from the village. The gate structure temporarily occludes the sky as the character walks beneath it, emerging toward the wilderness beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest trail descending from village

events.description: exiting village completely into forested wilderness area

agents.ego_description: walking down snowy slope into forested valley with scattered trees

entered.detail: dense forest of evergreen trees covering the hillside ahead
large snow-dusted boulders beside the path

segments.scene_description: Having left the village through the great gate, the character descends a snowy trail into a forested wilderness. Pine trees fill the background while rocky outcrops line the path. The environment shifts from constructed tribal architecture to natural wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a snowy, fortified tribal path that gradually opens into a clear, forested wilderness. It begins on a narrow trail beside wooden huts and spiked fortifications under heavy snowfall, which steadily clears to reveal a bright blue sky as the path widens. The scene then expands into a tribal village center, passing ancient stone ruins and a central totem pole before moving toward a massive gate of spiked logs. As the character passes beneath the looming structure of the gate, the village architecture recedes and the view opens up to the outdoors. Finally, the camera descends a snowy trail away from the settlement, shifting from constructed tribal buildings to a natural landscape of pine trees and rocky outcrops.
